refnamediv.refpurpose: Segment an image with fuzzy C-means clustering.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [labels, centers] = imsegfcm(image, clusterCount) [labels, centers] = imsegfcm(image, clusterCount, iterations, fuzziness)

listitem.para: Input grayscale or RGB image. RGB input is converted to grayscale.
Number of fuzzy clusters. Must be at least 2.
Fuzzy C-means exponent greater than 1. Default is 2.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Clusters grayscale intensity values with soft memberships and returns the winning one-based label and cluster centers.

refsection.title: Examples
